name: harness-vscode
description: Drive a harness session from the VS Code Agents window, over the gateway's HTTP/SSE edge.

chatSessions.name: harness
chatSessions.description: A harness session, streamed live from the gateway.

harness.gatewayUrl.description: Base URL of the harness gateway (http(s)://host:port).

harness.token.markdownDescription: Bearer token sent to the gateway. In the loopback dev gateway (`demo.sh`) the token IS the tenant, so any value names a fresh tenant. Prefer the `Harness: Set Gateway Token` command, which stores the token in VS Code SecretStorage instead of settings.

harness.kind.description: Session kind (grain type) to list and address, e.g. "assistant".

harness.withinSecs.description: Per-prompt wait ceiling in seconds sent as within_secs; the gateway clamps it to its own maximum.
